use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers and sidebars
Show author avatars alongside comments and forum posts
Present team member photos in about pages and org charts
Render user images in social feeds and activity streams
Display participant avatars in messaging and collaboration apps
ai_summary: A lightweight avatar component built on Radix UI primitives. Provides Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback components for displaying user profile pictures with automatic fallback to initials when images fail to load. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with a rounded-full design and responsive sizing.
